title: bidens riparia var. refracta
intro: Bidens riparia var. refracta, also known as Bur-marigold, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Bidens riparia var. refracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens riparia var. refracta can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
